style_authority.note: Resolves adaptive native mobile authority, preserves the calm field-operations context, and separates shared product semantics from platform presentation.

reference_selection.note: Applies product, iOS, Android, adaptive window-class, motion-physics, accessibility, design-system, and validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects the fixed identical shell and restores native back behavior, navigation, scalable text, semantic themes, controls, adaptive panes, and restrained feedback.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence as static and records the absence of source, build, lint, screenshots, accessibility trees, Simulator, Emulator, and hardware proof.

verified_boundary.note: Confines verified claims to supplied facts and separates unobserved accessibility, windowing, theme, interruption, performance, gesture, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides eight concrete moves for adaptive structure, navigation and back, size-specific surfaces, target sizes, scalable type, themes, controls, and motion.

scope_control.note: Maintains native UI-conformance scope with five blocking findings and eight moves in 85 logical lines, below the 150-line cap.
